name: Slack
description: Sends notifications to Slack via Incoming Webhooks.
webhookUrlDesc: The Incoming Webhook URL from your Slack App or Integration settings.
messageTemplateDesc: Slack markdown supported. Use {title}, {message}, {severity}, etc. to inject notification fields. For custom fields, use {custom_fields.your_key}.
emojiIconDesc: Optional Slack emoji code to use as the avatar (e.g., :rotating_light: or :warning:).
addFieldPlaceholder: Add a field e.g. tags, source_ip (press Enter)
previewBody: This is what your message might look like in Slack.
